title: Companion — The Binder
medium: interactive ledger imitating M. Eames' personal binder. 218 deterministically-generated entries across 1994–2026 documenting closed apertures around the village. filterable by decade and aperture type, with an expanding marginalia note in M.E.'s pencil per entry.
caption: I do not know what the binder is for, exactly. But I have used it. The absence of paper is paper.
